# Page Title: Medical Centre | IIT Jammu

## Welcome to our Institute Health and
Wellness Center

Welcome to our Institute Health and Wellness Center, your go-to
destination for all your medical needs on campus! Nestled in the serene southern
corner of our campus lies your gateway to well-being, our Health and Wellness
Center. Here amidst the tranquil surroundings, you'll discover a haven dedicated to
nurturing your health and vitality since 2018.

Here, we've got you covered with a dedicated team of full-time
doctors, a dentist, and even visiting specialists from renowned institutions like
AIIMS Jammu. Our team also includes four para-medical staff including male and
female staff, pharmacists/ drugstore, and technicians, all geared up to ensure you
receive high-quality healthcare services.

Picture this: you're on campus and away from your loved ones
needing medical attention. No worries! Our 24/7 ambulance services are just a call
away, ready to take you to our facility hassle-free.

# Page Title: Medical Centre | IIT Jammu
# Content Flags: short-markdown

24 hours Basic Life Support Ambulance available.

# Page Title: Medical Centre | IIT Jammu

## Strengthening Health and Wellness
Through Renowned Collaborations

At our Health and Wellness Centre, we prioritize your well-being by partnering
with renowned hospitals to provide top-quality care during emergencies. Our
collaborations include:

AIIMS Jammu: Access to advanced diagnostics and treatments.

Shri Mata Vaishno Devi Narayana Superspecialist Hospital, Jammu: Specialized
medical services and continuity of care.

Medanta Hospital, Gurugram: World-class medical attention for highly specialized
treatments.

Renowned Hospitals in Jalandhar: Broadened scope of medical services for
efficient treatment plans.
These partnerships ensure comprehensive and reliable care, offering
timely and effective medical attention. We coordinate closely with our
partner hospitals to manage appointments, facilitate emergency transfers,
and keep families updated, guaranteeing a smooth and stress-free experience.

With our robust network of collaborations,

# Page Title: Medical Centre | IIT Jammu

At our dental clinic, we are dedicated to enhancing your smile and
overall oral health. Our comprehensive range of services is designed to address
various dental needs, ensuring that you can confidently show off a brighter smile.
Led by expert surgeons, our team is committed to providing high-quality care and
personalized attention to every patient.

Our services include a variety of procedures aimed at restoring and maintaining
optimal dental health. These include extractions, root canal treatment (RCT),
scaling/cleaning, and fillings. Whether you require routine preventive care or more
complex treatment, our skilled professionals are equipped to meet your needs with
precision and expertise.

We understand the importance of convenience in accessing dental care, which is why
our clinic is open on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Fridays from 2:00 PM to 5:00 PM. This
scheduling ensures that you can receive the care you need at a time that fits your
busy

# Page Title: Medical Centre | IIT Jammu

Within the center, we offer a range of specialized services, including
minor surgical procedures aimed at addressing various health needs. These procedures
encompass essential interventions such as wound dressing, suturing, and
resuturing.

Our skilled healthcare professionals are equipped to provide expert care in these
areas, ensuring meticulous attention to detail and optimal patient comfort
throughout the process. Whether it's managing minor injuries or facilitating
post-operative care, our team is dedicated to delivering comprehensive and
compassionate service.

By offering these minor surgical procedures on-site, we provide convenient access to
essential healthcare interventions, promoting timely treatment and quick recovery
for our students and staff.

# Page Title: Medical Centre | IIT Jammu

Our 24-hour ECG service is here to help you always diagnose certain
heart conditions, including irregular heartbeats and coronary heart diseases.
At our Health and Wellness Center, we offer a vital 24-hour ECG service designed to
provide continuous monitoring and diagnosis of various heart conditions. Whether
you're experiencing irregular heartbeats or are concerned about coronary heart
disease, our ECG service is here to offer timely and accurate insights into your
cardiac health.

# Page Title: Medical Centre | IIT Jammu

## Message from doctors

Welcome to the new chapter of your journey. Hope you all are doing well and
prioritizing your physical and mental well-being.

Don't forget to engage in extracurricular activities like sports fests and cultural
celebrations; they're not just fun but essential for maintaining balance in your
life.

Connect with your peers, make friends, and don't be afraid to make mistakes –
they're often our greatest teachers. Remember to prioritize your well-being by
nourishing your body with regular meals and staying hydrated.

And speaking of well-being, make exercise a part of your daily routine; it's not
just good for your physical health, but also your mental well-being.
In the whirlwind of medical school, it's easy to doubt yourself, but remember that
everyone's journey is unique. Don't compare yourself to others; instead, support
each other and celebrate each other's successes. And above all, remember that
learning is a lifelong

# Page Title: Medical Centre | IIT Jammu

Our team of trained laboratory professionals is dedicated to providing
outstanding services, including painless and antiseptic blood removal, along with
basic diagnostics.

For specialized tests, we are proud to offer the services of a laboratory accredited
by the National Accreditation Board for Testing and Calibration Laboratories (NABL).
These tests can be collected between the hours of 7:00 AM and 9:00 AM, allowing for
timely and efficient processing of results.

Additionally, our center has established partnerships with renowned laboratories
such as Lal Path Labs and Swastik Lab. These collaborations enable us to access a
comprehensive range of diagnostic services and expertise.

During OPD hours, we also offer emergency tests such as blood sugar monitoring and
vital signs assessment, ensuring prompt attention to urgent healthcare needs. With
our commitment to excellence and access to state-of-the-art laboratory facilities,
you can trust u

# Page Title: Medical Centre | IIT Jammu

## The FACILITIES OFFERED

When you enter the reception area of our medical facility, you will notice a buzz of
activity. This is where your visit begins – the patient registration center. Our staff will
welcome you warmly and prioritize your health needs for follow-up.
You might see a line forming, as we generally operate on a first-come, first-served basis.
However, we always make exceptions for emergencies, giving them immediate attention.

Once you're all checked in, it's time to wait your turn in our comfortable waiting hall. We
have chairs for you to rest in while you wait, as well as necessities like drinking water, a
clean environment, and easily accessible toilets. We know waiting isn't fun, but we try to
make it as comfortable as possible.

Now, when your name gets called, In OPD, you'll meet with one of our doctors for your
clinical consultation. They'll take your medical history, give you a thorough once-over, and
come up with a dia

# Page Title: Medical Centre | IIT Jammu

Our Institute's pharmacy is your one-stop destination for all your
medication needs. We take pride in providing free, reliable, and high-quality
medicines to our beneficiaries, ensuring that you have access to essential
healthcare without any financial burden.

Our pharmacy stocks a comprehensive range of medications prescribed by our qualified
doctors. From basic over-the-counter drugs to essential and emergency medications,
we've got you covered.

But we don't stop at just providing medication. We understand the importance of
proper storage and handling to maintain the efficacy of your medicines. That's why
we have a dedicated refrigerator for storing medications, injections, and other
medical supplies, ensuring that they remain safe and effective for your use.

So the next time you visit our pharmacy, rest assured that you're not only receiving
quality medication but also the peace of mind that comes with knowing your health is
in good hands

# Page Title: Medical Centre | IIT Jammu

Our physiotherapy services are tailored to assist individuals in
healing from a diverse range of musculoskeletal pain issues, empowering them to
regain strength, mobility, and overall well-being. Within our facility, we offer a
selection of advanced modalities to address these concerns, including the Z trolley
and two physiotherapy beds.

Our team of experienced physiotherapists utilizes these modalities alongside
personalized treatment plans. Whether you're recovering from an injury, managing
chronic pain, or seeking rehabilitation after surgery, our comprehensive approach to
physiotherapy aims to optimize your recovery outcomes.

The Z trolley, known for its versatility and effectiveness, allows for targeted
therapy sessions that address specific areas of concern with precision and comfort.
Additionally, our two physiotherapy beds offer a supportive environment for hands-on
techniques and exercises designed to promote healing and improve func

# Page Title: Medical Centre | IIT Jammu

Within our ward facilities at the Health and Wellness Center, we offer
comprehensive surveillance and management of a variety of medical conditions,
ensuring that students and staff receive the care they need during times of illness.
Our dedicated team of healthcare professionals is trained to handle conditions such
as typhoid, acute gastroenteritis, Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease(COPD),
bronchial asthma, malaria, viral fever, acute febrile illness, and provide primary
first aid.

With a total of six In-patient beds (IPD), we can accommodate
individuals requiring closer monitoring and medical attention.
By offering these comprehensive services within our ward facilities, we aim to
promote recovery and well-being while ensuring the safety and comfort of our
patients.
Sanat Kumar Tiwari is the head or coordinator of the Medical Centre section at IIT Jammu. Designation: Chairperson - Medical Unit. Email: sanat.tiwari@iitjammu.ac.in.
